narrative:
Sharon Township has 13,907 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.0 percentage points.
